parsedJson.summary: The mobile page shows a recognizable roofing brand and phone CTA, but the desktop screenshot is blocked by a 403 error and the mobile hero feels cluttered and dated.

issues.title: Desktop site is inaccessible
issues.what_observed: The desktop screenshot shows a full-page teal error screen with the message "403 - Forbidden" and "Access to this page is forbidden" instead of the Brisco Roofing website.
issues.why_problem: A local customer searching for a Brisbane roofer on a laptop would immediately think the business website is broken, unavailable, or not professionally maintained, then return to Google and choose another roofer.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Desktop should load the same business homepage as mobile, with the logo, service headline, roofing photo, phone number, and quote button visible without any error page.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Resolve the access/configuration issue first, then rebuild the desktop above-fold section with a visible Brisco Roofing logo, clear Brisbane roofing service headline, phone CTA, quick quote CTA, and trust proof.
issues.plain_explanation: 电脑版网站现在不是在展示公司，而是在显示“禁止访问”的错误页面。
issues.customer_impact: 这会直接丢客户。很多本地客户会同时用电脑比较几家公司，看到打不开的网站通常几秒内就返回 Google，转而联系竞争对手。

issues.title: Quote tab is awkward on mobile
issues.what_observed: On the mobile screenshot, a red vertical "Quick Quote" tab is pinned to the right edge and partly competes with the main hero content.
issues.why_problem: A phone user has to mentally rotate or work harder to read the tab, and it makes the page feel like an overlay rather than a trustworthy local trades business.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Mobile should use a full-width sticky bottom bar or two clear buttons: "Call 1300 166 209" and "Get Quick Quote", both readable horizontally.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Remove the vertical right-edge tab on mobile and replace it with a bottom sticky CTA bar containing a phone icon button and a quote button with standard horizontal text.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机上的“Quick Quote”按钮竖着贴在右边，不像正常按钮，读起来费劲。
issues.customer_impact: 手机本地搜索占很大比例，客户越难看懂按钮，越少人会点击询价；一个明显的横向按钮通常更容易带来电话和表单咨询。

issues.title: Hero area feels crowded
issues.what_observed: The mobile hero stacks italic red letter-spaced text, a large navy all-caps service headline, grey subheading, navy CTA button, red phone button, floating phone icon, and a separate "QUICK QUOTE" bar all in the first screen.
issues.why_problem: A customer looking quickly for a roofer has too many competing visual elements to process, so the most important action, calling or requesting a quote, becomes less obvious.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: The first mobile screen should have one clear headline, one short supporting line, one primary phone button, one secondary quote button, and enough spacing so each item is easy to scan.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Simplify the hero copy to one main headline such as "Roof Restoration & Painting in Brisbane", keep the phone CTA as the primary red button, make quote the secondary button, and remove duplicate CTA treatments.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机首屏放了太多文字和按钮，客户一眼看不到最重要的下一步。
issues.customer_impact: 本地客户通常会在几秒内判断要不要联系你；首屏越乱，越容易让人犹豫，电话点击和询价都会减少。

issues.title: Visual style feels dated
issues.what_observed: The mobile hero uses a semi-transparent rounded white panel over a darkened roof photo, stretched all-caps typography, heavy shadows, and red/blue button styling.
issues.why_problem: The business may be experienced, but the design can make visitors wonder whether the company is current, detail-oriented, and professional enough for a high-value roof job.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A current roofing homepage would use a sharp real project photo, restrained navy/red brand colors, cleaner typography, flatter buttons, and visible proof such as reviews or years in business.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the frosted rounded hero card with a cleaner overlay layout, use one modern sans-serif type system, reduce shadows, and add review stars or license/service proof near the CTA.
issues.plain_explanation: 页面看起来有点旧，像多年没认真更新过的网站。
issues.customer_impact: 屋顶工程金额高，客户会特别看重可信度。网站显旧会让人担心服务质量也不够专业，从而去找看起来更可靠的同行。

issues.title: No trust proof visible first
issues.what_observed: In the mobile first screen, there is no visible star rating, customer review count, license badge, warranty mention, completed project proof, or local Brisbane trust marker.
issues.why_problem: A Google-searching customer comparing roofers wants quick reassurance before calling; without proof, the page asks for action before earning confidence.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Above the fold should show concise trust proof such as "4.8 stars from Brisbane homeowners", "Licensed & insured", "Roof restorations across Brisbane & Gold Coast", or a warranty note.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a compact trust row directly under the headline or CTA with review rating, licensed/insured status, and local service area proof.
issues.plain_explanation: 首屏没有马上告诉客户：别人信任你、你有资质、你在本地做过很多项目。
issues.customer_impact: 客户从 Google 进来时通常会比较 2-3 家公司；如果你的信任信息不明显，他们更可能联系那个马上展示评分、保障和案例的网站。

positive_observations: The mobile screenshot shows a clear Brisco Roofing logo at the top.
The phone number is visible above the fold on mobile.
The page uses real roofing imagery, which is relevant to the service.
redesign_priorities: 1. Fix the desktop 403 error so the website loads for laptop users.
2. Rebuild the mobile hero around one clear phone CTA and one quote CTA.
3. Add above-fold trust proof: reviews, licensed/insured status, warranty, and Brisbane service area.
